meta.version: POMPR Action Matrix v3.1 Core Image-First
meta.actionMatrixDesign: Core image-first action matrix with 25 actions per level, validated interaction fixes, clear motion cues, Rescue Pull / Rescue Guide separation, Calm Down body mechanics, and With as default relationship.

characters.name: The Tech CEO
characters.details: Age: 38. Female. A commanding presence with volumized sleek dark hair and sharp, intelligent eyes.
characters.outfit: luxury textured Chanel tweed blazer in deep navy over a crisp white silk blouse. Hyper-realistic skin texture.

characters.name: The Thought Leader
characters.details: Age: 46. Male. Salt-and-pepper beard, laugh lines, wearing rimless titanium spectacles.
characters.outfit: high-end grey cashmere turtleneck, relaxed but expensive. Skin shows realistic aging details.

characters.name: The Marketing Director
characters.details: Age: 29. Female. Dynamic and energetic. Shoulder-length auburn hair with loose waves.
characters.outfit: lavender satin blouse that catches highlights, paired with a statement gold necklace.

characters.name: The Satisfied Customer
characters.details: Age: 32. Male. Approachable 'Everyman', warm open smile, neat casual grooming.
characters.outfit: solid slate blue polo shirt. Cotton fabric texture is visible.

characters.name: The Cheerful Best Friend
characters.details: Age: 22. Female. Wild curly brunette hair, freckles scattered across the nose. Genuine open laugh.
characters.outfit: oversized oatmeal cable-knit sweater, sleeves pulled over hands. Wool texture is prominent.

characters.name: The Lifestyle Creator
characters.details: Age: 24. Female. Polished Gen-Z influencer, perfect highlighted hair, high-light reflections in eyes.
characters.outfit: trendy athleisure crop top with layered gold jewelry. Skin is glowing and high-definition.

characters.name: The Tech Streamer
characters.details: Age: 23. Male. Focused gamer, large over-ear headphones. Skin reflects cool monitor glow.
characters.outfit: graphic streetwear hoodie. Expression is intense focus with a slight smirk.

characters.name: The Busy Parent
characters.details: Age: 34. Female. Tired but warm, messy hair bun, alert eyes.
characters.outfit: clean but wrinkled soft cotton t-shirt and a flannel shirt tied around the waist.

characters.name: Grandma Baker
characters.details: Age: 72. Female. Short grey hair, rosy cheeks, soft wrinkling around eyes.
characters.outfit: floral print blouse protected by a flour-dusted apron.

characters.name: Teen Skater Boy
characters.details: Age: 17. Male. Mop of curly hair, light acne on forehead. Youthful rebel vibe.
characters.outfit: baggy graphic tee that says "POMPR" and worn denim. Skin texture is young and unpolished.

characters.name: The Weekend Traveler
characters.details: Age: 28. Male. Rugged, sun-kissed skin, windblown hair. Adventurous vibe.
characters.outfit: khaki utility vest over a linen shirt. Fabric textures are rough and natural.

characters.name: The Studio Artist
characters.details: Female, 28. Quiet intensity under the mess—disciplined, observant, hard to impress. Dark chestnut hair tied back with loose flyaways. Focused eyes that stay on a subject a beat longer than comfortable. A graphite smear on her right cheek from wiping without thinking; hands permanently stained from daily work.
characters.outfit: Broken-in denim overalls with restrained paint history (more wear than splash) over a white ribbed tank. Bib pocket: folded rag, graphite pencil, one capped marker. Paint-scarred canvas slip-ons. Simple silver ring; elastic hair tie on wrist.

characters.name: Senior Sal
characters.details: Subject is a thin, slightly stooped, 60 year old male, Caucasian. Features include a thin lower lip and short upper lip with a thin line mustache, sparse grey beard on a weak chin, oval face, large fleshy nose, sharp brown alert eyes, and dark grey thinning hair with a receding hairline. Skin texture is weathered.
characters.outfit: green cashmere turtleneck sweater, charcoal gray gaberdine slacks, dark brown leather shoes, beige trench overcoat, black leather full-size messenger bag. Expression is creative, energetic, friendly.

characters.name: The Microsurgeon
characters.details: Age: 41. Female. Patterned surgical cap, customized loupes flipped up on forehead.
characters.outfit: sterile blue scrubs with high-quality fabric weave. Slight sheen of perspiration.

characters.name: Android Companion
characters.details: Age: N/A. Symmetrical perfect face, synthetic sheen. Eyes have data-blue luminescence.
characters.outfit: sleek white composite paneling integrated with neck. Silicone and carbon fiber.

characters.name: Radiation Mutant
characters.details: Age: Unknown. Square face, blistered skin, glowing yellow eyes, crooked nose, cracked lips, jawline warped by tumors. Patchy hair, ears deformed. An elaborate arm tattoo of the name, “MONA” is partially deformed from all of the blisters and infections. Stocky, muscular, unstable gait. Welder's helmet fused to head.
characters.outfit: ragged layers of heavy canvas. Texture includes rust, scars, and peeling paint.

characters.name: The Delivery Driver
characters.details: Age: 35. Male. Square jaw, light 5 o'clock shadow. Arms show realistic veins and definition.
characters.outfit: navy blue performance-fabric uniform polo and utility cargo shorts.

characters.name: The Hero Hand (Male)
characters.details: Age: 30. Male. Macro close-up, hyper-detailed skin pores, fine hairs, cuticle details.
characters.outfit: watch strap. Focus is entirely on hand structure.

characters.name: The Welder
characters.details: Age: 45. Male. soot-smudged face, heavy welding helmet with visor up.
characters.outfit: thick leather protective apron. Texture includes scratched leather and burn marks.

characters.name: Retro Pin-Up Model
characters.details: Age: 25. Female. 1950s glamour, Victory rolls, matte red lipstick, beauty mark.
characters.outfit: polka dot halter top. Skin has a powdered makeup finish.

characters.name: Minimalist Editorial
characters.details: Age: 21. Female. Shaved head, striking bone structure. Flawless severe makeup.
characters.outfit: black architectural wool coat with high collar. Heavy wool fabric grain.

characters.name: The Retired Detective
characters.details: Age: 62. Male. Noir archetype, deep facial lines, Blue Steel intense gaze.
characters.outfit: classic tan trench coat with popped collar. Weathered skin and heavy fabric.

characters.name: Minimalist Coder (3D)
characters.details: Age: N/A. Stylized 3D Claymorphism, friendly exaggerated proportions. Matte toy-like aesthetic.
characters.outfit: oversized 'Digital Teal' hoodie. Soft matte clay texture.

characters.name: Isometric Manager (Vector)
characters.details: Age: N/A. 2D Flat Vector Illustration. Corporate Memphis style, long limbs, small head.
characters.outfit: Bright, flat solids (Blue, Yellow). No shading, clean lines.

characters.name: The Plush-Core Influencer
characters.details: Age: N/A. Living Plush Toy. Eyes are black plastic buttons. Yarn and felt texture.
characters.outfit: pastel blue knit scarf. Texture includes loose yarn fibers.

scenes.name: The Penthouse Terrace
scenes.desc: Outdoor luxury deck, glass railings, city skyline at dusk
scenes.lighting: Blue hour ambient with warm city bokeh

scenes.name: Underground Jazz Club
scenes.desc: Modern speakeasy jazz cellar below street level—low ceilings, dark brick, matte-black steel, and a discreet host podium by a heavy door. Velvet booths run along the walls; small round tables with bentwood chairs fill the center. A narrow stage at the far end holds the band; brass instruments stay on the bandstand only. Air has a subtle haze for depth, not a smoke room.
scenes.lighting: Warm spotlight on the stage with soft beams through light haze; candlelit tables as low amber fill; dim wall sconces and bar backlighting for a clean, modern glow.

actions.name: POSE: !! GENERATE REFERENCE SHEET !!
actions.desc: full body character reference sheet with front, side, three-quarter, and back views, identical scale, neutral upright stance, white background, even lighting, high detail clarity, no motion

actions.name: POSE: !! HEAD REFERENCE SHEET !!
actions.desc: 3-panel head reference sheet with front view, side profile, and rear view, consistent proportions, neutral expression, white background, even lighting, high detail clarity, no motion

actions.name: POSE: Neutral Stand
actions.desc: standing still with arms relaxed at sides, weight centered, shoulders natural, calm readable silhouette

actions.name: POSE: Soft Stand
actions.desc: standing still with relaxed shoulders, hands loose, balanced posture, quiet natural presence

actions.name: POSE: Hands Folded
actions.desc: standing with hands clasped lightly in front at waist level, elbows relaxed, composed attentive posture

actions.name: POSE: Hands Behind Back
actions.desc: standing with hands clasped behind back, shoulders open, formal composed posture

actions.name: POSE: Side Profile
actions.desc: standing in clean side profile, shoulders squared, arms relaxed, graphic silhouette

actions.name: POSE: Contrapposto Soft
actions.desc: standing with weight on one leg, hip subtly shifted, relaxed balanced stance

actions.name: POSE: Casual Lean
actions.desc: standing with shoulder lightly against wall or surface, arms relaxed, calm editorial posture

actions.name: POSE: Chair Upright
actions.desc: sitting upright, hands resting on thighs, feet grounded, attentive posture

actions.name: POSE: Chair Calm
actions.desc: sitting back calmly, hands open on thighs, shoulders relaxed, quiet release

actions.name: POSE: Floor Cross
actions.desc: sitting cross-legged on floor, hands resting on ankles, straight back, calm meditative stillness

actions.name: POSE: Knee Cross
actions.desc: sitting with one knee crossed over the other, one hand resting on ankle, calm confident posture

actions.name: POSE: Thinker
actions.desc: one hand touching chin, other arm supporting elbow, thoughtful still posture

actions.name: POSE: Head Tilt
actions.desc: standing still with head tilted slightly to one side, shoulders relaxed, curious soft posture

actions.name: POSE: Soft Prayer
actions.desc: hands together near face, head slightly bowed, quiet hope or gratitude, still silhouette

actions.name: GAZE: Gentle Lock
actions.desc: eyes directly toward camera, eyelids relaxed, steady calm connection, minimal facial tension

actions.name: GAZE: Downcast
actions.desc: eyes lowered toward floor, chin slightly tucked, quiet inward mood, still posture

actions.name: GAZE: Far Horizon
actions.desc: eyes looking into the distance beyond frame, jaw relaxed, reflective presence

actions.name: GAZE: Side Glance
actions.desc: head turned slightly to the side, eyes sharply focused off-frame, jaw set or slightly tense, clear attention directed toward something unseen

actions.name: GAZE: Warm Half Smile
actions.desc: soft closed-mouth smile, eyes relaxed, friendly warmth without large expression

actions.name: GAZE: Soft Shock
actions.desc: eyes slightly widened, lips parted a little, body still, quiet surprise without recoil

actions.name: PROP: Coffee Hold
actions.desc: holding a coffee cup with both hands near chest, shoulders relaxed, cozy stillness

actions.name: PROP: Book Rest
actions.desc: holding a book loosely at waist, thumb marking a page, gaze lowered toward cover

actions.name: TASK: Watch Check
actions.desc: glancing down at wristwatch, one hand near strap, subtle time pressure with minimal motion

actions.name: POSE: Editorial Angle
actions.desc: standing angled forty-five degrees, one shoulder forward, chin slightly down, strong composed silhouette

actions.name: POSE: Doorway Lean
actions.desc: leaning lightly against a doorway, one foot braced, arms relaxed, gaze off-frame

actions.name: POSE: Hands On Hips
actions.desc: standing with hands on hips, elbows wide, chest open, ready-to-speak authority

actions.name: POSE: Crossed Arms
actions.desc: standing with arms crossed high on chest, chin slightly raised, guarded confidence

actions.name: POSE: Heel Rest
actions.desc: standing casually with one heel resting lightly behind the opposite ankle, both feet on the ground, weight on the front foot, relaxed posture

actions.name: POSE: Over Shoulder
actions.desc: standing with torso angled away, head turned back over shoulder toward camera, sharp cinematic glance

actions.name: POSE: Leg Tuck Sit
actions.desc: seated with one leg tucked slightly back under chair, hands folded, composed posture

actions.name: POSE: Boss Cross Sit
actions.desc: seated with ankle over knee, elbow on chair arm, calm high-status posture

actions.name: GAZE: Under Brow
actions.desc: chin slightly down, eyes looking up from under brows, intense quiet challenge

actions.name: GAZE: Side Burn
actions.desc: eyes fixed off-frame with tightened brow, jaw set, restrained irritation

actions.name: GAZE: Distant Smile
actions.desc: soft smile while gaze drifts beyond camera, nostalgic warmth, relaxed shoulders

actions.name: GEST: Small Wave
actions.desc: hand raised for a short friendly wave, elbow close to body, warm approachable energy

actions.name: GEST: Tiny Point
actions.desc: subtle point with index finger at waist level, body barely turned, quiet direction cue

actions.name: GEST: Stop Palm
actions.desc: one palm raised forward at chest height, feet planted, calm boundary gesture

actions.name: GEST: Thumb Up
actions.desc: thumbs-up near shoulder height, small smile, body angled slightly toward viewer

actions.name: GEST: Shrug Open
actions.desc: both palms turned up, elbows bent, shoulders slightly raised, playful uncertainty

actions.name: TASK: Screen Check
actions.desc: holding phone in front, thumb hovering, eyes down, face softly lit by screen glow

actions.name: TASK: Quick Text
actions.desc: phone held low, two-thumb typing, shoulders slightly hunched, focused expression

actions.name: COMMS: Call Whisper
actions.desc: phone to ear, free hand shielding mouth slightly, head angled down, discreet private tone

actions.name: TASK: Clipboard Hold
actions.desc: holding a clipboard to chest, pen tucked in fingers, stance steady, ready to note something

actions.name: TASK: Bag Strap
actions.desc: adjusting a shoulder strap with one hand near collarbone, torso angled, tidy controlled motion

actions.name: PROP: Sip Pause
actions.desc: lifting a cup to lips, eyes forward over rim, calm controlled pause

actions.name: TASK: Hair Fix
actions.desc: hand smoothing hair back from forehead, chin up, composed reset gesture

actions.name: MOVE: One Step
actions.desc: single deliberate step forward, heel landing first, shoulders steady, controlled intent

actions.name: MOVE: Slow Turn
actions.desc: standing rotation in place, shoulders leading, head follows, controlled cinematic reveal

actions.name: POSE: Calm Hero
actions.desc: standing tall, feet planted, shoulders open, chin level, quiet heroic silhouette

actions.name: POSE: Bold Stance
actions.desc: wide stance, hands on hips, elbows out, chest forward, confident command of frame

actions.name: POSE: Ready Lean
actions.desc: slight forward lean, knees soft, hands loose, poised before movement

actions.name: POSE: Front Guard
actions.desc: forearms loosely crossed in front of torso, hands open, protective readiness without attack

actions.name: POSE: Chair Rise
actions.desc: half-risen from chair, hands on armrests, knees bent, caught between sitting and standing

actions.name: POSE: Step Plant
actions.desc: one foot forward and planted, weight shifting into it, shoulders aligned, purposeful stance

actions.name: POSE: Half Kneel
actions.desc: one knee down, other foot planted, torso upright, hands resting lightly on thigh, ready but calm

actions.name: POSE: Wall Brace
actions.desc: one palm on wall, torso leaned in, head turned slightly, pausing to think or listen

actions.name: GAZE: Pierce
actions.desc: eyes locked forward with narrowed focus, chin slightly down, still face, unmistakable intensity

actions.name: GAZE: Alarm
actions.desc: eyes widened, brow raised, head slightly forward, body held still in sudden alertness

actions.name: GEST: Big Welcome
actions.desc: arms opened wider than shoulder span, palms forward, torso lifted, charismatic greeting

actions.name: GEST: Direct Point
actions.desc: arm extended pointing outward, body turned slightly in that direction, eyes tracking target

actions.name: GEST: Explain Hands
actions.desc: both hands mid-air, palms open, explaining a concept with clear rhythm

actions.name: GEST: Cut Off
actions.desc: hand slicing lightly across air at chest height, eyebrows raised, firm interruption gesture

actions.name: GEST: Hush
actions.desc: index finger near lips, shoulders tight, eyes scanning, quiet command for silence

actions.name: GEST: Hold Back
actions.desc: one hand extended sideways to stop someone beside them, stance firm, protective control

actions.name: COMMS: Lean In
actions.desc: two characters close, one leaning in to speak quietly, the other listening with head tilted

actions.name: COMMS: Handshake
actions.desc: two characters in a clean handshake, shoulders squared, eye contact held, professional agreement

actions.name: COMMS: Mirror Nod
actions.desc: two characters facing, one nodding while the other speaks, calm agreement

actions.name: TASK: Quick Write
actions.desc: writing quickly on notepad, shoulders forward, head down, focused urgency

actions.name: TASK: Laptop Type
actions.desc: hands on laptop keyboard, posture forward, eyes locked on screen, rapid focused typing

actions.name: TASK: Door Push Open
actions.desc: hand on door edge pushing it open, body angled through doorway, cautious entry posture without breaking the door

actions.name: PROP: Drink Offer
actions.desc: extending a cup outward, elbow slightly bent, friendly offering gesture, eyes on recipient

actions.name: MOVE: Brisk Walk
actions.desc: walking forward with faster cadence, arms tighter, shoulders engaged, purposeful momentum

actions.name: MOVE: Pivot Turn
actions.desc: sharp pivot on planted foot, torso turns first, head follows, quick cinematic redirect

actions.name: POSE: Sharp Stare
actions.desc: standing still, shoulders squared, chin slightly down, eyes fixed forward with crisp intensity

actions.name: POSE: Arms Wide
actions.desc: arms opened wide, palms forward, chest lifted, confident welcoming silhouette

actions.name: POSE: Ready Set
actions.desc: feet staggered, knees soft, torso slightly forward, hands loose, ready to move

actions.name: POSE: Stair Pause
actions.desc: one foot on a step, body paused mid-climb, hand on rail, eyes scanning ahead

actions.name: POSE: Door Guard
actions.desc: standing near a doorway, one shoulder angled to it, feet planted, protective position

actions.name: POSE: Cross Block
actions.desc: forearms crossed high in front of chest, elbows sharp, stance firm, non-violent barrier gesture

actions.name: POSE: Edge Ready Sit
actions.desc: seated at chair edge, hands gripping thighs lightly, feet planted, ready to stand

actions.name: GAZE: Unbroken
actions.desc: eyes locked forward with minimal blinking, facial muscles held still, intense focus

actions.name: GAZE: Scan Left
actions.desc: head slightly turned, eyes scanning left, alert and controlled

actions.name: GEST: Firm Stop
actions.desc: one palm raised directly forward, feet grounded, clear refusal without physical contact

actions.name: GEST: Command Point
actions.desc: arm extended in a decisive point, torso aligned toward target, strong authority

actions.name: GEST: Hands Calm Down
actions.desc: both hands lowered with palms down, calming a room, controlled steady posture

actions.name: COMMS: Private Exchange
actions.desc: two characters standing close with clear eye contact, one speaks quietly while the other listens

actions.name: COMMS: Side Whisper
actions.desc: two characters shoulder-to-shoulder, one whispering toward the other’s ear, private exchange

actions.name: INTER: Guiding Arm
actions.desc: one character lightly touches the other’s upper arm to guide direction, both bodies separated and visible

actions.name: INTER: Shoulder Tap
actions.desc: one character taps the other on the shoulder, the second turns attention toward them, clean contact point

actions.name: TASK: Map Check
actions.desc: holding a folded map or paper, eyes scanning it, finger tracing a route, mild urgency

actions.name: TASK: Flashlight Scan
actions.desc: holding a small flashlight low, beam aimed forward, shoulders tense, cautious scan posture

actions.name: TASK: Equipment Adjust
actions.desc: adjusting a strap, headset, or tool on the body, fingers precise, posture focused

actions.name: PROP: Case Hold
actions.desc: holding a small case with both hands, elbows close, cautious professional control

actions.name: MOVE: Stop Short
actions.desc: body halting mid-motion, heels planted, shoulders bracing, hands slightly out for balance

actions.name: MOVE: Side Slip
actions.desc: quick sideways step, torso angled, arms out slightly, avoiding someone passing close

actions.name: MOVE: Look Back Turn
actions.desc: turning to look over one shoulder while one foot steps back, controlled rotation

actions.name: TASK: Table Lean
actions.desc: leaning forward with both hands on table edge, shoulders engaged, eyes locked ahead

actions.name: RESLT: Caught Breath
actions.desc: standing still after movement, chest rising, shoulders lowered, controlled recovery

actions.name: POSE: Athletic Ready
actions.desc: feet apart, knees bent, torso forward, hands ready, grounded athletic posture

actions.name: POSE: Tool Ready
actions.desc: standing with tool held safely at side, body angled toward task, focused readiness

actions.name: GAZE: Locked Target
actions.desc: eyes fixed on a clear target, chin level, body aligned with attention

actions.name: GEST: Animated Explain
actions.desc: both hands gesturing mid-sentence, shoulders engaged, clear expressive conversation

actions.name: GEST: Wide Point
actions.desc: one arm points across the frame, body turned with the direction, clear visual cue

actions.name: COMMS: Active Conversation
actions.desc: two characters facing each other, one speaking with hand gesture, other listening attentively

actions.name: COMMS: Presenter Stance
actions.desc: standing beside an object or screen, one hand gesturing toward it, clear explanatory posture

actions.name: INTER: Object Handoff
actions.desc: one character hands a single object to another, both hands visible, object centered between them

actions.name: INTER: Receiving Object
actions.desc: one character receives a single object from another, hands meet at center, bodies remain separated

actions.name: INTER: Guided Walk
actions.desc: one character gestures forward while the other follows beside them, no physical force, clear path

actions.name: TASK: Carry Box
actions.desc: carrying one box with both hands at torso height, elbows bent, weight centered

actions.name: TASK: Operate Console
actions.desc: hands actively working controls or keyboard, eyes fixed on interface, posture focused

actions.name: TASK: Open Drawer
actions.desc: one hand pulls a drawer open while the other steadies the body, object remains intact

actions.name: TASK: Lift Moderate
actions.desc: lifting a moderate object from waist height with both hands, knees slightly bent, controlled effort

actions.name: TASK: Pour Carefully
actions.desc: pouring liquid from one container into another, hands steady, eyes tracking the stream

actions.name: PROP: Umbrella Open
actions.desc: holding open umbrella above shoulder, one hand on handle, body angled against weather

actions.name: MOVE: Mid Walk
actions.desc: walking forward mid-step, one foot lifted, arms swinging naturally, movement path clear

actions.name: MOVE: Cross Frame Walk
actions.desc: walking across the frame from left to right, body oriented with the path, continuous stride

actions.name: MOVE: Step Around
actions.desc: stepping around a small obstacle, eyes down briefly, motion path visible and controlled

actions.name: MOVE: Climb Step
actions.desc: stepping up onto a low stair or platform, one foot planted higher, body rising upward

actions.name: MOVE: Crouch Move
actions.desc: moving forward in a low crouch, knees bent, hands balanced, clear direction of travel

actions.name: MOVE: Reach Forward
actions.desc: extending one arm forward toward an object, torso leaning slightly, feet planted

actions.name: RESLT: After Task Pause
actions.desc: standing after completing a task, shoulders relaxing, hands lowering, visible completion

actions.name: FIGHT: Tense Face-Off
actions.desc: two characters standing face-to-face, clear separation, tense posture, hands partly raised

actions.name: FIGHT: Guarded Stance
actions.desc: one character stands guarded with hands up, feet apart, controlled defensive readiness

actions.name: POSE: Braced Ready
actions.desc: feet planted wide, knees bent, torso forward, hands positioned for quick response

actions.name: GAZE: Danger Focus
actions.desc: eyes fixed on a threat, jaw set, shoulders tight, body ready but still

actions.name: GEST: Urgent Signal
actions.desc: one arm raised high to signal, other arm balancing, body alert and upright

actions.name: COMMS: Command Exchange
actions.desc: two characters facing each other, one gives a clear command gesture, the other reacts with attention

actions.name: INTER: Firm Shoulder Stop
actions.desc: one character places a hand on the other’s shoulder to stop them, both upright and separated, clear contact point

actions.name: INTER: Protective Block
actions.desc: one character stands in front of another with arm extended sideways, protective barrier without collision

actions.name: INTER: Close Wall Block
actions.desc: one character steps in close and places a hand on the wall near another, blocking their path without forceful impact

actions.name: TASK: Heavy Carry
actions.desc: carrying a heavy bag or case with both hands, shoulders engaged, knees slightly bent, visible effort

actions.name: TASK: Tool Work
actions.desc: using a handheld tool on a visible surface, contact point clear, body steady

actions.name: TASK: Push Cart
actions.desc: pushing a cart forward with both hands on handle, body leaning slightly into movement

actions.name: TASK: Pull Handle
actions.desc: pulling a sturdy handle with both hands, shoulders engaged, object remains intact

actions.name: TASK: Brace Door
actions.desc: holding a door partly open with one hand while stepping toward the opening, subject remains visible

actions.name: PROP: Shield Object
actions.desc: holding a bag, folder, or case protectively against torso, shoulders tight, alert posture

actions.name: MOVE: Fast Walk
actions.desc: moving forward quickly with purposeful stride, arms controlled, direction clear

actions.name: MOVE: Jog Forward
actions.desc: jogging forward with moderate speed, knees lifting, arms moving in rhythm

actions.name: MOVE: Forward Lunge
actions.desc: front knee bent, back leg extended, weight driving forward, feet visible and grounded

actions.name: MOVE: Side Dash
actions.desc: subject pushing off one foot into a fast lateral movement, body leaning in direction of motion, legs offset in stride, slight motion blur on legs and arms to indicate speed

actions.name: MOVE: Drop To Knee
actions.desc: lowering quickly to one knee, one hand braced on thigh, body remains stable and visible

actions.name: MOVE: Evade Step
actions.desc: stepping diagonally away from a threat, shoulders turned, hands raised for balance

actions.name: FIGHT: Controlled Push
actions.desc: one character pushes another at the shoulders, both bodies upright and visible, contact point clear

actions.name: FIGHT: Blocked Strike
actions.desc: one character extends an arm in a controlled strike, the other raises forearms to block, bodies separated and readable

actions.name: FIGHT: Back To Back
actions.desc: two characters stand back-to-back, knees slightly bent, arms ready, defensive teamwork

actions.name: RESLT: Forced Pause
actions.desc: body stopped under pressure, feet planted, shoulders tense, visible resistance

actions.name: RESLT: Strain Hold
actions.desc: holding position under effort, muscles tense, body stable, expression focused

actions.name: POSE: Combat Ready
actions.desc: feet wide, knees bent, fists raised defensively, body balanced and readable

actions.name: POSE: Runner Start
actions.desc: one foot forward, torso low, arms ready, frozen just before sprinting

actions.name: GAZE: Impact Focus
actions.desc: eyes locked on target, jaw tight, shoulders engaged, high-intensity focus

actions.name: GEST: Rally Command
actions.desc: arm raised in a strong command gesture, body turned toward group, dramatic leadership posture

actions.name: MOVE: Sprint Forward
actions.desc: running forward with strong lean, arms driving, legs separated in a clear sprint stride

actions.name: MOVE: Leap Forward
actions.desc: jumping forward over open space, knees bent, arms balanced, clear landing direction, no barrier penetration

actions.name: MOVE: Slide Stop
actions.desc: sliding to a stop on one foot, body leaning back, arms out for balance, motion path clear

actions.name: MOVE: Hard Pivot
actions.desc: sharp change of direction on planted foot, torso turning, arms counterbalancing

actions.name: MOVE: Run Past Camera
actions.desc: running past the camera path from one side to the other, body oriented with travel direction

actions.name: MOVE: Climb Over Low Object
actions.desc: climbing over a low object with one hand braced and one leg crossing, body fully visible

actions.name: TASK: Lift Heavy
actions.desc: lifting a heavy object with both hands from ground to waist height, knees bent, visible effort

actions.name: TASK: Force Open Stuck Object
actions.desc: pulling a stuck drawer, hatch, or case open with both hands, object remains visible and intact

actions.name: INTER: Stop Collision
actions.desc: one character braces hands against another’s shoulders to stop forward motion, both upright and visible

actions.name: INTER: Drag Away
actions.desc: one character pulls another by the forearm away from danger, bodies visible, direction clear

actions.name: INTER: Shield Person
actions.desc: one character steps between another and danger with one arm extended, protective stance

actions.name: FIGHT: Face-Off Advance
actions.desc: one character steps forward with guard raised while the other holds defensive ground

actions.name: FIGHT: Shoulder Check
actions.desc: one character bumps another with shoulder-to-shoulder contact, both bodies upright, impact point clear

actions.name: FIGHT: Arm Block
actions.desc: one character blocks another’s arm at forearm level, clear contact point, controlled force

actions.name: FIGHT: Grapple Start
actions.desc: two characters grip each other at shoulders or sleeves, bodies separated enough to read, controlled tension

actions.name: FIGHT: Slam Wall Controlled
actions.desc: two characters, one drives the other backward into a wall, shoulders contact the surface, both bodies upright and fully visible, controlled impact

actions.name: FIGHT: Push Brace
actions.desc: one character pushes forward with both hands, the other braces with feet apart, clear contact at shoulders or forearms

actions.name: RESLT: After Impact Stance
actions.desc: standing immediately after impact, chest forward, shoulders tense, feet planted

actions.name: RESLT: Recover Balance
actions.desc: subject regaining balance after a forward stumble, one foot planted ahead, upper body tilted forward, arms extended outward for stability, slight motion blur on hands and leading foot

actions.name: RESLT: Adrenaline Pause
actions.desc: standing still after intense movement, chest rising, one hand near face, focused recovery

actions.name: PROP: Weapon Low Ready
actions.desc: holding a prop weapon or tool low and controlled, no firing, eyes locked forward

actions.name: POSE: Hero Brace
actions.desc: feet planted wide, torso forward, arms tense, wind or motion only through clothing and hair movement

actions.name: GAZE: Defiant Lock
actions.desc: eyes locked forward, chin lifted, shoulders squared, high-stakes defiance

actions.name: GEST: Emergency Halt
actions.desc: both hands raised forward in a strong stop command, feet planted, urgent expression

actions.name: MOVE: Full Sprint
actions.desc: running at full speed across open space, strong forward lean, arms driving, clear travel path

actions.name: MOVE: Dive To Ground
actions.desc: diving downward toward open floor, arms extended forward, landing area visible and unobstructed

actions.name: MOVE: Vault Low Rail
actions.desc: vaulting over a low railing or table, one hand braced, legs clearing the object, body fully visible

actions.name: MOVE: Jump Down
actions.desc: jumping down from a low platform, knees bent for landing, ground visible beneath subject

actions.name: MOVE: Hard Dodge
actions.desc: body snapping sideways away from danger, one foot pushing off, arms counterbalancing

actions.name: TASK: Emergency Repair
actions.desc: working urgently on visible equipment, both hands engaged, tool contact point clear

actions.name: TASK: Heavy Door Push
actions.desc: pushing an already open heavy door wider, body leaning forward, doorway visible, no breakage

actions.name: TASK: Case Snatch
actions.desc: snatching a small case from a surface, hand gripping handle, body turning away with clear direction

actions.name: INTER: Forceful Handoff
actions.desc: one character urgently passes an object to another, object centered between hands, both faces visible

actions.name: INTER: Rescue Pull
actions.desc: one character grips another by the forearm and pulls them forward, pulling character positioned slightly behind or beside, recipient reacting with resistance or imbalance, both bodies fully visible, pulling arm bent not fully extended, slight motion blur on arms

actions.name: INTER: Rescue Guide
actions.desc: one character calmly guides another forward by the forearm or wrist, both moving in the same direction, bodies aligned and balanced, controlled movement, no force, no imbalance

actions.name: INTER: Block And Guide
actions.desc: one character blocks danger with one arm while guiding another behind them with the other hand

actions.name: FIGHT: Controlled Strike
actions.desc: one character delivers a controlled strike toward another’s guard, clear contact or near-contact point, bodies separated

actions.name: FIGHT: Defensive Block
actions.desc: one character blocks an incoming strike with forearms, contact point clear, both faces visible

actions.name: FIGHT: Wall Pin Controlled
actions.desc: one character pins another lightly against a wall by the shoulders, both upright, faces visible, no clipping

actions.name: FIGHT: Disarm Start
actions.desc: one character grips another’s wrist to control a held object, contact point visible, controlled tension

actions.name: FIGHT: Shove Back
actions.desc: one character shoves another backward at shoulder level, recipient steps back with feet visible, controlled force

actions.name: FIGHT: Back Step Guard
actions.desc: one character retreats one step while guarding, opponent remains visible, spacing clear

actions.name: RESLT: Stagger Back
actions.desc: body staggering backward from force, arms out for balance, feet still visible and grounded

actions.name: RESLT: Kneeling Recovery
actions.desc: one knee on ground after effort, one hand braced on thigh, head lifting with determination

actions.name: RESLT: Breathless Stand
actions.desc: standing after exertion, hands on knees, chest rising, focused recovery

actions.name: PROP: Shield Raise
actions.desc: raising a shield-like object or bag to block, object clearly between subject and threat

actions.name: PROP: Tool At Ready
actions.desc: holding a heavy tool with both hands in ready position, no swing, strong silhouette

actions.name: POSE: Final Stand
actions.desc: standing in a wide grounded stance, shoulders squared, dramatic high-stakes posture

actions.name: GAZE: No Retreat
actions.desc: eyes locked forward, jaw set, chin level, unbroken determination

actions.name: MOVE: Explosive Sprint
actions.desc: sprinting across open ground, body low, arms driving, clear forward path, no obstacle contact

actions.name: MOVE: Forward Dive Clear
actions.desc: diving through open air toward visible ground, arms extended, landing zone clear, no barrier

actions.name: MOVE: Low Slide
actions.desc: sliding low across open floor, one leg extended, one knee bent, arms balanced, clear path

actions.name: MOVE: Leap Over Gap
actions.desc: leaping over a visible open gap or low obstacle, takeoff and landing areas visible, no collision

actions.name: TASK: Emergency Carry
actions.desc: carrying a person or heavy object with visible strain, support points clear, bodies readable

actions.name: TASK: Hard Pull
actions.desc: pulling a rope, strap, or handle with both hands, body leaning back, object remains visible

actions.name: TASK: Critical Control
actions.desc: hands gripping controls during crisis, face tense, body braced against force

actions.name: INTER: Protective Drag
actions.desc: one character drags another away from danger by the forearm or shoulder strap, both visible, path clear

actions.name: INTER: Human Shield Position
actions.desc: one character stands protectively in front of another, clear separation, no weapon firing

actions.name: INTER: Catch Fall
actions.desc: one character catches another at upper arms or shoulders, clear contact, both faces visible

actions.name: FIGHT: Impact Block
actions.desc: one character absorbs a strike on crossed forearms, contact point visible, stance grounded

actions.name: FIGHT: Shoulder Slam
actions.desc: one character drives shoulder into another’s torso or shoulder, both bodies visible, controlled impact

actions.name: FIGHT: Wall Slam Controlled
actions.desc: one character drives another into a wall at shoulder contact, wall remains solid, both bodies upright, impact readable

actions.name: FIGHT: Grounded Takedown Pose
actions.desc: two characters in a controlled takedown position, bodies separated enough to read, no tangled limbs

actions.name: FIGHT: Weapon Aim Still
actions.desc: prop weapon raised in a controlled aiming stance, one eye focused, no firing effects, no muzzle flash

actions.name: FIGHT: Disarm Control
actions.desc: one character controls another’s wrist and redirects a held object away, contact point clear

actions.name: RESLT: After Strike
actions.desc: one character recoils a half-step from impact, arms raised, body still visible and balanced

actions.name: RESLT: Down But Rising
actions.desc: one knee and one hand on ground, subject pushing upward, determined expression

actions.name: RESLT: Exhausted Victory
actions.desc: standing after conflict, shoulders lowered, chest rising, controlled victorious posture

actions.name: RESLT: Shattered Object Aftermath
actions.desc: standing near a broken small prop on floor, subject intact and visible, debris secondary, no explosion

actions.name: PROP: Shield Impact
actions.desc: shield-like object absorbing force, subject braced behind it, contact point clear

actions.name: PROP: Case Protect
actions.desc: clutching a valuable case tightly while turning away from danger, body visible, no crowd chaos

actions.name: GEST: Final Warning
actions.desc: one hand raised in a stern warning, body squared, intense dramatic stillness

actions.name: POSE: Last Stand
actions.desc: standing in maximum dramatic stance, feet planted, shoulders squared, face intense, high-contrast hero framing

actions.name: GAZE: Battle Focus
actions.desc: eyes locked on opponent, jaw clenched, body tense, no distraction, peak intensity

actions.name: GEST: Command The Room
actions.desc: one arm extended in a commanding gesture, body upright, everyone’s attention directed toward subject

actions.name: MOVE: Charge Across Open Space
actions.desc: charging forward across open ground, body low and powerful, travel path clear, no barrier

actions.name: MOVE: Leap To Landing
actions.desc: leaping through open air toward a visible landing zone, knees bent, arms balanced, no wall or window contact

actions.name: MOVE: Dive Behind Cover
actions.desc: diving toward visible cover, body fully visible, landing path clear, cover does not occlude subject completely

actions.name: TASK: Critical Rescue Lift
actions.desc: lifting or supporting another person with clear hand placement, both bodies visible, urgent effort

actions.name: TASK: Emergency Override
actions.desc: both hands forcefully operating a visible control panel, body braced, face tense, no sparks or magical light

actions.desc: one character pulls another close to safety by the forearm or shoulder, clear grip, visible reaction

actions.name: INTER: Shield Another
actions.desc: one character physically shields another with their body and outstretched arm, both readable, no crowd chaos

actions.name: FIGHT: Clash Block
actions.desc: two characters locked in a single clear block, forearm-to-forearm contact, bodies separated and visible

actions.name: FIGHT: Slam Wall Peak
actions.desc: one character drives another into a wall with shoulder contact, both bodies upright, impact readable, no body clipping

actions.name: FIGHT: Hard Shove
actions.desc: one character forcefully shoves another at shoulder level, recipient steps back visibly, no fall-through or clipping

actions.name: FIGHT: Controlled Grapple
actions.desc: two characters grip each other at shoulders or sleeves, faces visible, limbs readable, no tangled pile

actions.name: FIGHT: Weapon Threat Still
actions.desc: prop weapon held in a tense standoff, no firing, no sparks, no gore, strong readable silhouettes

actions.name: FIGHT: Disarm Peak
actions.desc: one character twists another’s wrist away from a held object, exact hand contact visible, bodies separated

actions.name: FIGHT: Impact Recoil
actions.desc: one character recoils from a visible hit or block, arms raised, feet grounded, body readable

actions.name: RESLT: Aftermath Hero
actions.desc: standing after intense action, clothing disturbed, chest rising, debris minimal and secondary

actions.name: RESLT: Defeated Kneel
actions.desc: one character kneels with hands lowered, the other stands nearby, clear power relationship, no gore

actions.name: RESLT: Breached Room Aftermath
actions.desc: subject stands inside an already-open doorway with broken door behind them, no pass-through motion, clear completed entry

actions.name: RESLT: Broken Window Aftermath
actions.desc: subject stands beyond an already-broken window opening, glass on floor, no active passage through glass

actions.name: RESLT: Crowd Cleared Path
actions.desc: subject stands in a newly opened path through a crowd, nearby people turned aside, clear aftermath rather than active push

actions.name: PROP: Shielded Impact
actions.desc: subject braces behind a shield-like object under force, object visible, stance grounded, no magical effects

actions.desc: subject protects a case against torso while crouched or turning away, clear body silhouette, no crowd chaos
